inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the IRA account holder. Must be at least 70.5 for QCD eligibility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the IRA account holder. Must be at least 70.5 for QCD eligibility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRA hesap sahibinin yaşı. QCD uygunluğu için en az 70,5 olmalıdır.

inputs.label: Distribution Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount intended for charitable distribution directly from IRA (max $100,000 per year).

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount intended for charitable distribution directly from IRA (max $100,000 per year).
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRA'dan doğrudan hayır amaçlı dağıtım için amaçlanan tutar (yılda maksimum 100.000 $).

inputs.label: Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your top marginal income tax rate, used to estimate tax savings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your top marginal income tax rate, used to estimate tax savings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi tasarrufunu tahmin etmek için kullanılan en yüksek marjinal gelir vergisi oranınız.

inputs.label: IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: Total value of your traditional IRA, for reference (RMD computation may apply).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of your traditional IRA, for reference (RMD computation may apply).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geleneksel IRA'nızın toplam değeri, referans amaçlı (RMD hesaplaması uygulanabilir).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
